title: Woman arrested on murder charge following a man's death in Waboomskraal
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A 23-year-old woman was arrested on a murder charge following the death of a man (30) on a farm in Waboomskraal, George,  on Christmas day.


> According to Warrant Officer Chris Spies, Southern Cape police spokesperson, George police opened a murder docket following the death of the man at about 21:00.


"It is alleged that the victim and a woman had an argument when he was stabbed. He sustained a stab wound to the chest and while walking towards the gate he collapsed. He was later declared dead by paramedics on scene."

The woman is expected to appear in the George Magistrate’s Court today, Monday, 29 December.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
